title: Acosta oviceps

This family comprises over 600 genera and 13,000 species, many of which are economically and ecologically significant. The family is characterized by its diverse range of plant forms, from small shrubs to large trees. The classification of Acosta oviceps reflects its evolutionary history and relationships with other plants within the Rubiaceae family.
